designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — organic, nature-forward, rounded, flowing with earthy greens, sustainable wellness aesthetic and gamified reward UX

features: Dynamic Eco-Quests with completion tracking and Bloom Bucks rewards
Community Canopy Fund with animated progress meter
Bloom Box Lottery with entry count and countdown
Impact Explorer Map with SVG neighborhood visualization and project markers
User Profile with level progression, stats, and achievement badges
Light/Dark theme toggle with full theme system
interactions: Tap quest cards to complete and earn Bloom Bucks
Category filter tabs on Quests screen
Tap map markers to see project detail
Theme toggle in Home header and Profile screen
